title: welcoming smoked portuguese herring gratin
description: a savory, cheese-pull post-workout portuguese dish featuring herring, tandoor and dash friendly flavors.
instructions: preheat the oven to 375 degrees fahrenheit.
in a large skillet, melt the tandoor-spiced butter over medium heat.
add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
add the sliced red onion and cook until caramelized, about 5 minutes.
add the smoked herring and cook for 2 minutes, breaking it up with a spoon.
stir in the flour and cook for 1 minute.
add the bechamel sauce and cook until heated through.
stir in the shredded cheddar cheese until melted and smooth.
season with salt and black pepper to taste.
transfer the mixture to a baking dish and top with additional cheddar cheese.
bake for 20 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
sprinkle with chopped parsley and serve warm.
